academic_requirements.summary: Applicants need a secondary school diploma suitable for university access, must meet country-specific entry-title rules, and must complete the CEnT-S process required by the programme.
academic_requirements.prior_degree_or_diploma: Secondary Studies diploma (or equivalent) with at least 12 years of schooling suitable for access to higher education.
academic_requirements.subject_requirements: No specific school-subject prerequisites were stated on the international admissions page; applicants must instead complete the CISIA CEnT-S process and upload the weighted score. [uncertain]
academic_requirements.gpa_or_country_requirements: Country-based specific entry title requirements apply. Non-EU candidates residing outside Italy must sit the CEnT-S by 12 March 2026. If the school record is shorter than 12 years, additional post-secondary study or foundation-course proof is required.

accepted_proofs: A recognised English certificate meeting the University minimum scores, such as TOEFL iBT 80, IELTS 6.0, Cambridge B2 First 173, or PTE Academic 65.
A previous qualification completed entirely in English, documented through self-certification or an official statement showing the language of instruction.
A provisional statement of results from the certifying body is accepted while waiting for the final certificate.
exemption_rules: Applicants whose entry qualification was completed entirely in English are exempt from submitting a separate English certificate.
Native English speakers from recognised countries, including the United States, are exempt from submitting a separate English certificate.
language_requirements.deadline: [uncertain] The common 2026/27 English-language admissions page says English proof is due by 31 August for open-access degree programmes, while the Earth and Climate Dynamics Italian-title admission notice requires the language requirement by 30 September 2026.

application_deadline_eu.call_three: [uncertain] 2 June 2026 - 2 August 2026 (the official programme listing and University timeline show 2026, while the apply page appears to contain a 2025 typo).
application_deadline_eu.notes: The third call is only for EU students and non-EU students residing in Italy.

application_deadline_non_eu.call_three: Not applicable for non-EU applicants residing outside Italy.
application_deadline_non_eu.notes: The third call is restricted to EU students and non-EU students residing in Italy.

required_documents.document_name: Proof of registration to and results of the CEnT-S test
required_documents.notes: Upload the weighted score as soon as it is issued; non-EU applicants residing outside Italy must sit the test by 12 March 2026.

required_documents.document_name: Upper secondary school certificate or provisional/enrolment certificate
required_documents.notes: The qualification must reflect at least 12 years of schooling; if not yet awarded, a provisional certificate is accepted.

required_documents.document_name: Proof of additional post-secondary study or foundation course
required_documents.notes: Required only if the applicant does not have a minimum 12-year school record.

required_documents.document_name: Certificate of entrance examination to access university
required_documents.notes: Required only if the law of the country where the upper secondary certificate was awarded requires such an examination for university access.
EU citizens and non-EU citizens residing in Italy may use an ID card; other applicants use a passport.
Required only for non-EU citizens residing in Italy.

required_documents.document_name: English language certificate or other accepted proof
required_documents.notes: Required unless the applicant qualifies for an official exemption.

required_documents.document_name: Original and legalised previous qualifications with English or Italian translations
required_documents.notes: No legalised documents are required at application stage, but successful applicants must later present original and legalised documents for enrolment.

entry_exam_or_test.applies_to: All applicants; non-EU applicants residing outside Italy must sit the test by 12 March 2026.
entry_exam_or_test.dates: [uncertain] The international apply page lists 27 November 2025, 16 December 2025, 15 January 2026, 19 February 2026, 26 February 2026, and 12 March 2026; the Italian-title admission notice also describes a third April-June macro-period.
entry_exam_or_test.scoring_or_threshold: A weighted CEnT-S score must be uploaded. The programme's admission notice states that students with fewer than 5 correct answers in Mathematics receive an OFA in Mathematics.

source_quotes.quote: take at least one CEnT-S test

uncertainty_notes: The official international apply page for 2026/27 shows 'Call Three: 2 June 2025 – 2 August 2026', but the official programme listing and the University Study in English timeline show 2 June 2026 – 2 August 2026. This JSON records the 2026 date.

No separate 2026/27 foreign-qualification PDF call was found for Earth and Climate Dynamics; the official apply page and common University admissions pages were used for international-admissions details.

The common 2026/27 English-language admissions page gives a 31 August deadline for open-access programmes, while the Earth and Climate Dynamics call for Italian entry titles gives 30 September 2026 for the language requirement.
The international admissions page does not list school-subject prerequisites beyond the general diploma requirement and the CEnT-S process.
